***************************
Materials Screening
***************************

Materials screening sub-package manages the LCA screening of early stage material production concepts. A materials screening project (:py:class:`~pod_lca.materials_screening.Project`) can maintain multiple models (:py:class:`~pod_lca.materials_screening.Model`) reflecting alternative concept choices. Each model will made up of it consituent list of :py:class:`~pod_lca.materials_screening.Product` and :py:class:`~pod_lca.materials_screening.Process` objects.

-------

.. toctree::
   :maxdepth: 3

   project
   model
   products-and-processes
